title: ottleya utahensis
intro: Ottleya utahensis, also known as Utah peavine, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Ottleya utahensis include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and treat various skin conditions due to its antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Ottleya utahensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
